patch.value: Consolidate package lifecycle: extension/package/install/upgrade under a single pm package namespace

extension and package (already partial synonyms) plus top-level install and upgrade unify under pm package <verb> (install/upgrade/list/describe/enable/disable/...); extension, install, upgrade become hidden aliases. Duplicate check: pm-jqd2/pm-3wsi/pm-b3e9 are install-behavior bugs/hints, not surface consolidation.

pm package covers the full extension/install/upgrade verb set with flag parity; extension/install/upgrade spellings alias-shimmed with identical output; scope semantics (project/global) unchanged; contracts/MCP/completions/docs regenerated; existing extension+install+upgrade specs pass via aliases
